items.title: Trump Announces $100K Fee for H-1B Visas. How Big Tech Companies Could Be Affected.
items.description: The Trump administration on Friday issued a proclamation adding a $100,000 fee for H-1B visas, a special type of employment visa for highly skilled workers.  Big Tech companies are major users of these types of visas.  Six companies–  Alphabet Amazon.com Apple Meta Platforms Microsoft  and  Nvidia  –used 35,000 of the 85,000 available H-1B visas in the 2025 fiscal year.

items.title: Boomer Dad Paid $25K for His First Home in 1980. Now Admits To His Kids, 'This Isn't Just Expensive...It's Impossible. You're Playing a Rigged Game'
items.description: For years, generational debates have been fueled by the same talking points: avocado toast, lazy work ethics, and complaints about "kids these days." But when it comes to housing, the clash between baby boomers and younger generations isn't just a ...

items.title: What Does Par Pacific Holdings' (PARR) Insider Selling Say About Analyst Optimism for Its Margins?
items.description: On September 15, 2025, Par Pacific Holdings Director Timothy Clossey sold 2,000 shares, marking the seventh insider sale and no insider purchases at the company in the past year. This ongoing insider selling comes as analysts highlight the company’s resilient refining margins and strong operational performance amid a broadly positive industry outlook. We'll explore how analyst optimism, supported by strong earnings and margin trends, could influence Par Pacific Holdings' investment...

items.title: Will Airbnb’s (ABNB) AI-Powered ‘Everything App’ Ambition Redefine Its Diversification Narrative?
items.description: In recent days, Airbnb announced plans to invest up to US$250 million to transform its platform into an AI-powered 'Everything App' for lifestyle services, signaling a shift beyond traditional short-term rentals. This move is intended to open new business avenues and help offset challenges from ongoing regulatory restrictions on short-term rental markets. We'll explore how Airbnb's push into AI-driven services may influence its long-term earnings growth and diversification narrative. The...
